notes: Phase 4 (Zul'Aman) Best in Slot from the Icy Veins TBC Classic Arcane Mage Dps gear guide — sourced from the original 2007-2008 Burning Crusade release (both raid tiers are already fully documented regardless of the TBC Anniversary realm's current progress). Enchants show the top-ranked pick per slot; the guide page lists further ranked alternatives. Gems are the general class/role recommendation from the guide's gemming section.

gems.name: Chaotic Skyfire Diamond (+15 crit rating, +3% crit damage) — needs two blue/purple/green gems
Runed Crimson Spinel (+8 spell damage, Tier 6) — Runed Living Ruby before Tier 6
Potent Pyrestone (+4 spell damage / +4 crit, Tier 6) — or Veiled Pyrestone if short on hit
any blue/green gem sufficient to activate the meta (e.g. a Spirit/Mp5 hybrid) — minimize blue sockets otherwise
